title: Nel ventre dell'enigma
overview: A series of bloody murders bloodied the streets of Turin. Whose hand is it that is executing women and men with such precise choices and in such brutal ways? And what relationship do the murders have with the school where some kids are engaged in what is undoubtedly the most important and dangerous exam of their lives?
